title: poa kirkii var. auklandica
intro: Poa kirkii var. auklandica, also known as New Zealand Tussock Grass, is a variety of the Poa kirkii grass species native to New Zealand. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antimicrobial activity. Poa kirkii var. auklandica can be prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
